title: vitis biformis
intro: Vitis biformis, also known as the 'biform grape', is a type of grapevine that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Vitis biformis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Vitis biformis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
